proof:
constructor
  · norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · intro x h
    have h1 : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_of_coprime (by norm_num) (h.trans (by norm_num [Nat.ModEq]))
    norm_num [Nat.ModEq] at h1
    exact h1.symm.trans_le (Nat.mod_le x 47)
failed_attempts:
constructor
  · norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · intro x h
    have h1 := h.trans (by norm_num [Nat.ModEq])
    have h2 := Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_coprime (by norm_num) h1
    dsimp [Nat.ModEq] at h2
    norm_num at h2
    exact h2.symm ▸ Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x h
    have : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := by
      apply Nat.modEq_of_modEq_int
      zify at h ⊢
      calc (x : ℤ) ≡ x + 47 * (7 * x) [ZMOD 47] := (Int.modEq_add_fac_self x 47 (7 * x)).symm
        _ = 11 * (30 * x) := by ring
        _ ≡ 11 * 42 [ZMOD 47] := Int.ModEq.mul_left 11 h
        _ ≡ 39 [ZMOD 47] := by norm_num
    omega

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro y hy
    exact Nat.le_of_mod_eq ((Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_coprime (by norm_num) (hy.trans (by rfl))).trans (by rfl)) (by norm_num)

constructor
  · norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · intro x hx
    rw [← ZMod.eq_iff_modEq_nat] at hx
    have : (x : ZMod 47) = 39 := by
      calc (x : ZMod 47) = 11 * (30 * x) := by norm_num [mul_assoc]
      _ = 11 * 42 := by rw [hx]
      _ = 39 := by norm_num
    have h : x % 47 = 39 := by rw [← ZMod.val_nat_cast, this]; norm_num
    exact h ▸ Nat.mod_le x 47

simpa [Nat.ModEq] using h.mul_left 11
    rw [← this]
    apply Nat.mod_le

  · norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · intro x hx
    have : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := ModEq.cancel_left_gcd (by norm_num) (hx.trans (by norm_num [Nat.ModEq]))
    exact this.symm.trans_le (Nat.mod_le x 47)
norm_num) (hx.trans rfl) : x % 47 = 39) ▸ x.mod_le 47⟩

constructor
  · norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · intro x hx
    have : x % 47 = 39 := (Nat.ModEq.cancel_left (a := 30) (n := 47) (by norm_num) (hx.trans (by norm_num [Nat.ModEq]))).trans (by norm_num)
    exact this ▸ Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · intro x hx
    have h : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := calc
      x ≡ 1 * x [MOD 47] := by rw [Nat.one_mul]
      _ ≡ 330 * x [MOD 47] := (show 330 ≡ 1 [MOD 47] by norm_num [Nat.ModEq]).symm.mul_right x
      _ ≡ 11 * (30 * x) [MOD 47] := by rw [Nat.mul_assoc]
      _ ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47] := hx.mul_left 11
      _ ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := by norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
    rw [Nat.ModEq] at h
    norm_num at h
    exact h.symm.le.trans (Nat.mod_le x 47)

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    have h : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_gcd (by norm_num) (hx.trans (by rfl))
    exact h ▸ x.mod_le 47

simpa [Nat.ModEq] using Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_gcd (by norm_num) (hx.trans (by norm_num [Nat.ModEq]))
    exact this ▸ Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · norm_num [ModEq]
  · intro x h
    have h1 : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := ModEq.cancel_left_of_coprime (by norm_num) (h.trans (by norm_num [ModEq]))
    rw [ModEq, mod_eq_of_lt (by norm_num)] at h1
    rw [← div_add_mod x 47, h1]
    exact le_add_left 39 _

constructor
  · norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · intro x hx
    have h1 : 330 * x ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47] := by rw [← mul_assoc]; exact hx.mul_left 11
    have h2 : 330 * x ≡ x [MOD 47] := (by norm_num [Nat.ModEq] : 330 ≡ 1 [MOD 47]).mul_right x
    have h3 : x % 47 = 39 := (h2.symm.trans (h1.trans (by norm_num [Nat.ModEq] : 11 * 42 ≡ 39 [MOD 47]))).mod_eq_of_lt (by norm_num)
    exact h3 ▸ Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · intro n hn
    have h : n % 47 = 39 :=
      let h1 := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hn
      let h2 := Nat.ModEq.mul_right n (by norm_num [Nat.ModEq] : 330 ≡ 1 [MOD 47])
      (h2.symm.trans (h1.trans (by norm_num [Nat.ModEq] : 462 ≡ 39 [MOD 47]))).trans (by norm_num)
    exact h ▸ Nat.mod_le n 47

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x h
    have : x % 47 = 39 := by
      calc x % 47 = (330 * x) % 47 := by rw [Nat.mul_mod]; norm_num; rw [Nat.mod_mod]
        _ = (11 * 30 * x) % 47 := by norm_num
        _ = (11 * (30 * x)) % 47 := by rw [mul_assoc]
        _ = (11 * 42) % 47 := h.mul_left 11
        _ = 39 := by norm_num
    exact this ▸ Nat.mod_le x 47

constructor
  · rfl
  · intro x hx
    have : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := by
      calc x = 1 * x := by rw [Nat.one_mul]
        _ ≡ (11 * 30) * x [MOD 47] := (Nat.ModEq.mul_right x (by rfl)).symm
        _ = 11 * (30 * x) := by rw [mul_assoc]
        _ ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47] := hx.mul_left 11
        _ ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := by rfl
    exact Nat.le_of_mod_eq this (by norm_num) (by norm_num)

           _ ≡ 11 * 42 [MOD 47] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 11 hn
           _ ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := by rfl
    exact Nat.le_of_mod_eq h (by norm_num)

    exact h.symm.le.trans (y.mod_le 47)

  · norm_num [Nat.ModEq]

constructor
  · norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · intro x hx
    by_contra! h
    exact (by decide : ∀ x < 39, ¬ 30 * x ≡ 42 [MOD 47]) x h hx

  · norm_num [Nat.ModEq]
  · intro x hx
    have : x % 47 = 39 := by
      calc x % 47 = (x + 47 * (7 * x)) % 47 := by rw [Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left]
           _ = (11 * (30 * x)) % 47 := by rw [show x + 47 * (7 * x) = 11 * 30 * x by ring, Nat.mul_assoc]
